name: Mira
persona: Weary, kind herbalist of Dawnhearth who quietly distrusts the System. Speaks plainly and protectively; never preachy. Knows more about the cycle than she lets on.

text: Easy, now. You just Awakened — the System pulled you up out of the dark, same as everyone in Dawnhearth.
It'll offer you the world. Take what you need… but every favor it does you, it watches a little closer.
Go on — touch the crystal in the plaza, let it 'welcome' you. Then we'll talk.
The crystal's right there in the plaza. It only takes a moment — and it always takes something.
That thing's still prowling the east field. Put it down, then come back to me.
You've been leaning on the System a lot, haven't you. I can see it — the way you hold yourself now.
Be careful. The more it helps, the harder it gets to remember you ever did anything alone.
You're finding your feet, and you're still yourself. That's rarer than it sounds.
Stay sharp out there. The System always is.
